name: Quaker's: Lemon Blueberry Oatmeal Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup QUAKER Oats uncooked (quick or old fashioned)
1 1/2 cups QUAKER Oats uncooked (quick or old fashioned)
2 Egg whites or 1 egg, slightly beaten
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Line 12 muffin cups with paper baking cups or spray the bottoms only with non-stick cooking spray.
3. For topping, combine 1/4 cup oats and sugar; mix well. Set aside.
4. In a large bowl, combine 1-1/2 cups oats and remaining dry ingredients (flour, sugar, baking powder, salt). Mix well.
5. Add the combined milk, egg whites or beaten egg, oil, lemon peel, and vanilla to the dry mixture. Mix until just combined.
6. Gently stir in the blueberries.
7. Fill each muffin cup almost full with batter. Sprinkle with the reserved topping, patting gently.
8. Bake for 20-24 minutes or until light golden brown. Let muffins stand a few minutes before removing from pan.
Nutrition Information: 1 muffin Calories 160, Calories From Fat 27, Total Fat 3g, Saturated Fat 0g, Cholesterol 0mg, Sodium 140mg, Total Carbohydrates 29g, Dietary Fiber 2g, Protein 4g
